code_half.evidence: src/contracts/settlement_semantics.py:171 uses rounding_rule='oracle_truncate'; lines 71-79 dispatch oracle_truncate AND floor to np.floor(scaled). oracle_truncate is the named alias for floor with HKO/UMA justification. Landed in commit d99273a 'feat: Oracle Penalty system + SettlementSemantics oracle_truncate + round_fn injection' before this workbook was authored.

constitutional_half.evidence: grep -inE 'half.?up|WMO|asymmetric|universal' AGENTS.md returns ZERO matches as of 2026-04-26. Some intervening change discharged the constitutional concern; no AGENTS.md amendment needed.
